server.name: iTechSmart UAIO MCP Server
server.description: Governed autonomous IT operations with cryptographic proof

tools.name: verify_prooflink_receipt
tools.description: Verify the cryptographic integrity of a ProofLink receipt. Checks hash validity, chain linkage to previous receipt, and schema completeness against the canonical production ledger. Returns NOT FOUND for unknown IDs — never synthesizes a result.

receipt_id.description: SHA-256 receipt ID or first 16 hex chars of the receipt hash

tools.name: get_receipt_chain
tools.description: Fetch and verify the complete ProofLink receipt chain from the canonical production ledger. Returns real receipt count, chain break count, and the N most recent entries with full cryptographic metadata.

limit.description: Number of recent receipts to return

tools.name: query_uaio_status
tools.description: Real-time platform health metrics. Container count via live docker ps, receipt count from canonical ledger, NIST CSF and HIPAA compliance scores. No hardcoded values.

tools.name: get_incident_details
tools.description: Fetch details of a specific autonomous remediation incident from the canonical ProofLink ledger. Returns the actual ledger entry with before/after state, remediation actions, timing, and receipt ID. Returns NOT FOUND for unknown IDs.

incident_id.description: ProofLink receipt ID, ledger entry ID, or ITSM ticket ID

tools.name: list_recent_incidents
tools.description: Returns chronological list of recent autonomous remediation incidents from the canonical ProofLink ledger. All entries are real — no generated or synthetic data.

tools.name: simulate_infrastructure_attack
tools.description: Trigger a real infrastructure attack simulation against an isolated sandbox container via the Break-It API. The platform autonomously detects, remediates, and generates a real ProofLink receipt from the canonical ledger. Returns actual timing and receipt — nothing is synthesized.

target.description: Target container (must be in the isolated sandbox pool)

tools.name: get_platform_briefing
tools.description: Full real-time health snapshot of the iTechSmart platform: 18 service statuses (systemd + Docker), SIE security queue totals, disk usage, uptime, receipts count, gate state, and next SIE scan time.

services.description: Map of service name to status

tools.name: get_sie_queue
tools.description: Retrieve pending SIE security findings awaiting approval. Filterable by detector type, fix class, and severity.

tools.name: get_compliance_status
tools.description: Live compliance scores: NIST CSF, HIPAA, SOC 2 Type II with per-control evidence and gap analysis.

tools.name: dispatch_ag2_incident
tools.description: Send an IT incident to the 6-agent AG2 GroupChat for autonomous diagnosis and remediation planning. SEMI_AUTO mode: plan returned for human review before execution.

tools.name: search_platform_logs
tools.description: Search live journalctl logs for any iTechSmart systemd service by service name and optional grep/regex pattern.

tools.name: approve_sie_finding
tools.description: Approve a specific SIE security finding by queue index. Applies the fixer, seals a ProofLink receipt, removes item from queue. EXECUTE — modifies files on disk.

tools.name: trigger_sie_scan
tools.description: Kick off a fresh SIE platform scan. dry-run detects only; apply fixes safe_auto items and seals receipts. Background job — check get_platform_briefing ~2 min later.

tools.name: get_iself_journal
tools.description: Retrieve iSELF self-healing history: what failed, root cause diagnosis, patch applied (systemctl restart / config fix), success/failure, and confidence score per event.

tools.name: brain_query
tools.description: Search the iTechSmart 5-layer Agent Brain (L1 .md files, L2 Wiki, L3 Letta vector, L4 Knowledge Graph). Returns context, related agents, and knowledge graph connections.

layers.description: Comma-separated layers to search: md,wiki,vector,graph (default: all)

tools.name: cluster_status
tools.description: Returns the current multi-regional cluster topology — registered sites, heartbeat timestamps, and inter-site latency. Use this to check cluster health before cross-site operations.

tools.name: port_registry
tools.description: Query or check the iTechSmart port registry to avoid port conflicts. Lists all registered ports with service name and owner. Use before assigning a new port.

action.description: Action: list, check, or register (default: list)

port.description: Port number to check or register

service.description: Service name when registering a port

tools.name: integration_status
tools.description: Parallel health check across all wired third-party integrations: Langfuse LLM observability, RAGflow RAG platform, Shuffle SOAR, Tactical RMM, MeshCentral device management, and Probo compliance. Returns ok:true/false and service-specific metadata for each.

integrations.description: Map of service name to health result

tools.name: langfuse_health
tools.description: Check Langfuse LLM observability platform health. Returns ok status and organisation name.

tools.name: langfuse_trace
tools.description: Create a Langfuse trace to log an LLM interaction. Captures name, input, output, model, userId, tags, and arbitrary metadata. Returns the trace ID on success.

tools.name: ragflow_health
tools.description: Check RAGflow RAG platform health. Returns ok status and total dataset count.

tools.name: ragflow_query
tools.description: Query the RAGflow knowledge base with a natural-language question. Searches across uploaded documents and returns the answer with source citations. Optionally filter to specific dataset IDs.

tools.name: shuffle_health
tools.description: Check Shuffle SOAR platform health. Returns ok status, authenticated user, and active workflow count.

tools.name: shuffle_trigger
tools.description: Trigger a Shuffle SOAR workflow by workflow UUID. Optionally pass a JSON body to the workflow execution trigger. Returns execution result and status.

body.description: Optional JSON body passed to the workflow trigger

tools.name: trmm_health
tools.description: Check Tactical RMM platform health. Returns ok status and total enrolled agent count.

tools.name: trmm_agents
tools.description: List all Tactical RMM managed agents. Returns hostname, OS platform, status (online/offline/overdue), site name, client name, and last-seen timestamp per agent.

tools.name: trmm_summary
tools.description: Get Tactical RMM agent summary: total count, online, offline, overdue, and list of distinct site names.

tools.name: trmm_run_script
tools.description: Run a saved Tactical RMM script on a specific managed agent by agent ID and script ID. Returns job ID on success. EXECUTE — triggers real remote script execution.

agent_id.description: TRMM agent ID or agent_id string

tools.name: mesh_health
tools.description: Check MeshCentral remote device management health via meshctrl CLI. Returns ok status, admin username, and enrolled device count.

tools.name: mesh_devices
tools.description: List all devices enrolled in MeshCentral remote management. Returns device name, hostname, OS description, connectivity status, power state, IP address, and mesh group per device.

tools.name: probo_health
tools.description: Check Probo compliance platform health (SOC2 / EU AI Act control tracking). Returns ok status and total control count.

tools.name: probo_controls
tools.description: List all Probo compliance controls with status, category, and description. Covers SOC 2 Type II and EU AI Act control frameworks.

tools.name: probo_risks
tools.description: List all Probo compliance risks with severity level and status. Use with probo_summary for a full compliance picture.

tools.name: probo_summary
tools.description: Get Probo compliance aggregate summary: control pass/fail/not-started counts, risk high/medium/low breakdown, and task open/done totals.

tools.name: get_learning_queue
tools.description: Get patterns pending human approval from the Learning Arbiter. These are Tier 2 items (score 50-85) that require human sign-off before promotion to the Mega Brain.

tools.name: approve_learning_item
tools.description: Approve a Tier 2 learning pattern for promotion to Agent Brain + Weaviate. Provide the pattern_id from get_learning_queue.

tools.name: get_learning_metrics
tools.description: Get Learning Arbiter cycle metrics: patterns processed, tier distribution, promotion counts, and known pattern library size.

tools.name: prooflink.verify_chain
tools.description: Read-only audit scope for verifying the ProofLink receipt chain. Alias of get_receipt_chain.

tools.name: prooflink.verify_receipt
tools.description: Read-only audit scope for verifying a single ProofLink receipt by ID. Alias of verify_prooflink_receipt.

tools.name: prooflink.search_receipts
tools.description: Read-only audit scope for searching recent ProofLink receipts for post-hoc reconstruction.

tools.name: mission.list_incidents
tools.description: Read-only mission scope for recent autonomous IT incidents.

tools.name: mission.cluster_health
tools.description: Read-only mission scope for cluster health.

tools.name: compliance.audit_summary
tools.description: Read-only compliance scope for CISO and auditor review.
